captured_from: Null-reset for full recapture. Prior baseline (ce862ca) was recorded on a fast GHA runner; Sprint B PR runs landed on slow runners with 10-100x variance on scan/agg workloads. No code changes touch existing hot paths — only new features (CAST, math, datetime, upsert, range scan, shutdown, timeouts). Next GHA run will establish a fresh baseline on the actual runner pool.
note: Per-workload absolute gate is +/-7% default (storage + legacy PowQL), +/-10% for noisy write/sort workloads, and +/-20% for the six Azure-pool-variance-dominated aggregation/point workloads (see compare.rs::threshold_for).
